examples: When he left the office, that was it, the workday was over.
This hands-on management approach often stretches his workday from 6 a.m. to 11 p.m.
The length of the workday, for many workers, is defined by time.
The workday typically starts right at 8 am and ends right at 5:30 pm.
Like Reagan, Thompson does not feel guilty about signing off when his workday is done.
